name: 17 含氮有机化合物（胺/氨基酸/酰胺）
subject: chemistry
domain_name: AS 有机化学 Organic Chemistry
curriculum_points: 1 define the term isotope in terms of numbers of protons and neutrons
2 understand the notation xA for isotopes, where x is the mass or nucleon number and is the atomic or y y proton number
3 state that and explain why isotopes of the same element have the same chemical properties
4 state that and explain why isotopes of the same element have different physical properties, limited to mass and density

excerpts.text: 1 define the term isotope in terms of numbers of protons and neutrons
2 understand the notation xA for isotopes, where x is the mass or nucleon number and is the atomic or y y proton number
3 state that and explain why isotopes of the same element have the same chemical properties
4 state that and explain why isotopes of the same element have different physical properties, limited to mass and density

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID，常见: H2O=1H2O, NaCl=1NAC, C2H5OH=1EHT
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示
GeoGebra 化学计量比可视化
